parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.all()[0].json;

const xml = `
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Import Data</TALLYREQUEST>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <IMPORTDATA>
      <REQUESTDESC>
        <REPORTNAME>Vouchers</REPORTNAME>
        <STATICVARIABLES>
          <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>My Company Pvt Ltd</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
        </STATICVARIABLES>
      </REQUESTDESC>

      <REQUESTDATA>
        <TALLYMESSAGE xmlns:UDF="TallyUDF">
          <VOUCHER VCHTYPE="Sales" ACTION="Create">
            <DATE>${d.invoice_date}</DATE>
            <VOUCHERNUMBER>${d.invoice_no}</VOUCHERNUMBER>
            <VOUCHERTYPENAME>Sales</VOUCHERTYPENAME>
            <PARTYLEDGERNAME>${d.party_name}</PARTYLEDGERNAME>
            <PERSISTEDVIEW>Invoice Voucher View</PERSISTEDVIEW>

            <ALLINVENTORYENTRIES.LIST>
              <STOCKITEMNAME>${d.item_name}</STOCKITEMNAME>
              <RATE>${d.rate}</RATE>
              <ACTUALQTY>${d.quantity} Nos</ACTUALQTY>
              <BILLEDQTY>${d.quantity} Nos</BILLEDQTY>
              <AMOUNT>${d.amount}</AMOUNT>
            </ALLINVENTORYENTRIES.LIST>

            <LEDGERENTRIES.LIST>
              <LEDGERNAME>${d.party_name}</LEDGERNAME>
              <ISDEEMEDPOSITIVE>No</ISDEEMEDPOSITIVE>
              <AMOUNT>${d.total_amount}</AMOUNT>
            </LEDGERENTRIES.LIST>

          </VOUCHER>
        </TALLYMESSAGE>
      </REQUESTDATA>
    </IMPORTDATA>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>
`;

return [
  {
    json: {
      tally_xml: xml
    }
  }
];

parameters.subject: ❌ Invoice Creation Failed – Tally
parameters.message:
=Hello Team,

Invoice Tally me create nahi ho paya.

Error Details:
Status: {{ $json.status }}
Message: {{ $json.message || 'No response from Tally' }}

Invoice Info:
Customer Name: {{ $json.customerName }}
Invoice No: {{ $json.invoiceNo }}
Amount: ₹{{ $json.amount }}

Please check Tally server / XML format and retry.

Regards,
n8n Automation System
